name: Fried Bananas Almandine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bananas in half lengthwise.
2. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat.
3. Add the banana halves and almonds to the pan.
4. Saute until the bananas are golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
5. In a separate saucepan, heat the chocolate sauce and orange liquor until combined.
6. Pour the chocolate sauce into dessert plates, covering the center of each plate.
7. Arrange the fried banana pieces neatly on top of the chocolate sauce in each plate.
Note: The original recipe had some formatting issues with missing punctuation and line breaks. I have cleaned up the presentation while keeping the same ingredients and instructions as provided.
